    item FAMAS
    {
        DisplayCategory = Weapon,
        Type = Weapon,
        ItemType = base:weapon,
        DisplayName = FAMAS,
        Icon = FAMAS,
        WeaponSprite = FAMAS,
        StaticModel = FAMAS,
        AttachmentType = Rifle,
        Weight = 4.0,
        AmmoType = base:bullets_556,
        AmmoBox = 556Box,
        MagazineType = Base.556Clip,
        MaxAmmo = 30,
        MinDamage = 2,
        MaxDamage = 3,
        MinRange = 0.61,
        MaxRange = 50,
        SoundRadius = 120,
        SoundVolume = 25,
        FireMode = Auto,
        FireModePossibilities = Auto/Single,
        ReloadTime = 22,
        AimingTime = 40,
        AimingPerkCritModifier = 8,
        AimingPerkHitChanceModifier = 4,
        JamGunChance = 1,
        NPCSoundBoost = 1.5,
        ImpactSound = null,
        SwingSound = FAMASShoot,
        HitSound = BulletHitBody,
        RackSound = M16Rack,
        ShellFallSound = M16CartridgeFall,
        EquipSound = M16Equip,
        UnequipSound = M16UnEquip,
        Tags = HasMetal;Firearm,
        AimingPerkMinAngleModifier = 0.01,
        AimingPerkRangeModifier = 0,
        AimReleaseSound = M16AimRelease,
        BreakSound = M16Break,
        BringToBearSound = M16BringToBear,
        ClickSound = M16Jam,
        ConditionLowerChanceOneIn = 140,
        ConditionMax = 25,
        CritDmgMultiplier = 4,
        CriticalChance = 30,
        CyclicRateMultiplier = 1,
        DoorDamage = 10,
        DropSound = M16Drop,
        EjectAmmoSound = M16EjectAmmo,
        EjectAmmoStartSound = M16EjectAmmoStart,
        EjectAmmoStopSound = M16EjectAmmoStop,
        HitChance = 100,
        IdleAnim = Idle_Weapon2,
        InsertAmmoSound = M16InsertAmmo,
        InsertAmmoStartSound = M16InsertAmmoStart,
        InsertAmmoStopSound = M16InsertAmmoStop,
        IsAimedFirearm = TRUE,
        KnockBackOnNoDeath = TRUE,
        KnockdownMod = 4,
        MaxHitCount = 3,
        MaxSightRange = 10,
        MetalValue = 45,
        MinAngle = 0.90,
